test_cases.prompt: clip this article for me https://example.com/some-post
test_cases.expected_output: Fetches the URL, climbs the extraction ladder for author/published/description, writes a frozen Resource file with type: article in frontmatter, reports the file path.

test_cases.prompt: clip https://reddit.com/r/somewhere/comments/xyz, I think it's an article
test_cases.expected_output: Detects the URL is a Reddit thread, notices the conflict with the user's stated type, flags it before writing rather than silently picking either side.

test_cases.prompt: clip this youtube video: https://youtube.com/watch?v=abc123, it has no captions at all
test_cases.expected_output: Attempts youtube-transcript-api, gets NoTranscriptFound or TranscriptsDisabled, reports a clean failure and writes nothing — does not attempt any workaround.
